# komodo_stack_deploy_if_changed (Action)

Checks deployed contents vs latest, and only if any changes are found will trigger a `docker compose up` on the target Komodo stack.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The ID of the stack to deploy if changed.

### Optional

- `stop_time` (Number) Override the default termination max time (seconds). Only used if the stack needs to be taken down first.
